title: ZXBrick Levels
description: Learn about ZXBrick's 100 handcrafted levels and how level progression fits into the wider arcade experience.
summary: ZXBrick includes 100 handcrafted levels built around retro-inspired brick-breaking arcade progression.
sourceNotes: Level layouts, unlock rules, difficulty curve, scoring rules, and completion behavior are To Verify from app source before publishing as detailed mechanics.

sections.heading: Overview
paragraphs: ZXBrick includes 100 handcrafted levels. The levels are part of the game's retro brick-breaking arcade structure, giving players a clear progression path alongside high score tracking, achievements, leaderboards, unlockable themes, and BarkinMad Coins.

sections.heading: Progress
paragraphs: The current website data confirms the level count and supporting progression systems. ZXBrick level play is part of the wider arcade loop alongside high scores, achievements, leaderboards, unlockable themes, and BarkinMad Coins.

sections.heading: Related Systems
paragraphs: ZXBrick level play connects naturally with the wider app systems shown on the main app page, including achievements, leaderboards, high score tracking, unlockable themes, and [BarkinMad Coins](/zx-series).

faq.question: How many levels are in ZXBrick?
